claimText: The Belém Health Action Plan is the world's first international climate adaptation plan dedicated specifically to health.
evidenceExcerpt: Belém Health Action Plan is the world's first international climate adaptation plan dedicated to health, backed by $300 million initial funding.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the unique features of COP30 outcomes.
distractorHooks: Confusing it with a climate mitigation plan rather than an adaptation plan
Attributing the first health-dedicated climate plan to an earlier COP like COP21 or COP28

claimText: The Belém Gender Action Plan (GAP) was adopted at COP30 for the period 2026-2034 to implement the Lima Work Programme on gender.
evidenceExcerpt: Belém Gender Action Plan (GAP) was adopted for 2026-2034 to implement the Lima Work Programme on gender.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching the Belém GAP to the Lima Work Programme.
distractorHooks: Linking the Belém GAP to a different foundational agreement instead of the Lima Work Programme
Providing an incorrect implementation timeframe, such as 2025-2030

claimText: The Declaration on Information Integrity on Climate Change represents the first time the topic of information integrity has been included in the COP Action Agenda.
evidenceExcerpt: Declaration on Information Integrity on Climate Change marks the first time information integrity is included in the COP Action Agenda.
examUse: Statement-based question on new thematic inclusions in the UNFCCC COP process.
distractorHooks: Stating that information integrity has been a standard part of the COP Action Agenda since the Paris Agreement
Confusing 'information integrity' with carbon market accounting rules rather than climate disinformation

claimText: The Belém Declaration on Hunger, Poverty, and People-Centered Climate Action was signed by 43 countries and the EU to address unequal climate impacts.
evidenceExcerpt: Belém Declaration on Hunger, Poverty, and People-Centered Climate Action was signed by 43 countries and the EU to address unequal climate impacts on vulnerable populations.
examUse: Statement-based question regarding the scope and signatories of the Belém Declaration on Hunger and Poverty.
distractorHooks: Claiming the declaration was universally adopted by all UNFCCC parties
Stating the declaration focuses primarily on agricultural greenhouse gas mitigation rather than unequal climate impacts on vulnerable populations
